purpose: Define the execution boundary between universal UXC generation and surface-specific runtime customization.

patches: XAS-PATCH-002: Added orbit_binding_required gate for Stardance products
XAS-PATCH-004: Added surface_extension_type_registry with supported types
Clarified that XAS does not automate domain-specific surface logic
changelog.ptc_approval: Approved for patch (narrow scope, no architecture reopen)

architecture.model: XAS Universal Spec + Surface Extension Contract
architecture.principle: XAS automates the reusable UXC execution backbone. Surface-specific domain logic is defined in the Surface Extension Contract, not by XAS.

layer_a_universal_spec.purpose: Generate reusable UXC execution backbone for all surfaces.

layer_b_surface_extension.purpose: Define domain-specific runtime behavior and intelligence logic. NOT owned or generated by XAS.
layer_b_surface_extension.note: XAS provides the scaffold and enforces the gate. DTC/DRJ provide the substance.

surface_extension_type_registry.purpose: Registry of supported Surface Extension types. XAS gate will validate extension_type against this list.

registry.purpose: Signal observatory, interpretation, evidence, confidence, and governed action routing.
Ontology-specific assessment, scoring, gap detection, and recommendation rendering.
Learning-state, capability-formation, overlay, and instructional surface behavior.
Generic UXC activation, specification-generation, and surface-initiation flow.

surface_extension_type_registry.extensibility: New extension types must be approved by PTC and added to registry before Codex execution is permitted.

gate_001_surface_extension_required.rule: If a surface is being built, its Surface Extension Contract MUST be provided. No surface without an extension.
gate_001_surface_extension_required.enforcement: XAS shall reject any Universal Spec that does not reference a complete Surface Extension Contract.
gate_001_surface_extension_required.purpose: Prevents surface spec from being incomplete or missing domain-specific logic.

gate_002_orbit_binding_required_for_star.rule: If product is 'Stardance Platform', 'SCOUT System', 'Docente', or other Stardance-owned product, orbit_binding MUST be present and complete.
gate_002_orbit_binding_required_for_star.enforcement: XAS shall reject Universal Spec if orbit_binding is missing or incomplete for Stardance products.
gate_002_orbit_binding_required_for_star.rationale: Orbit binding is a first-class requirement in Stardance canon (v3.0). All Stardance surfaces must have explicit orbit binding.
gate_002_orbit_binding_required_for_star.exception: Non-Stardance products (white-label, external) may have orbit_binding: optional

gate_003_codex_execution_readiness.name: Codex Execution Readiness Gate
gate_003_codex_execution_readiness.rule: Codex may NOT execute full surface implementation until ALL of the following are complete:
gate_003_codex_execution_readiness.enforcement: DTC must validate all 6 conditions and provide signed-off checklist before Codex begins full execution.
gate_003_codex_execution_readiness.purpose: Prevents partial, broken, or incomplete surface builds. Ensures all upstream work is complete.

gate_004_surface_extension_type_validati.rule: Any Surface Extension must declare extension_type that exists in the registry (above).
gate_004_surface_extension_type_validati.enforcement: XAS shall reject extension_type values not in registry. DTC must request new type through PTC approval process.
gate_004_surface_extension_type_validati.purpose: Prevents arbitrary or unsupported extension types. Maintains architecture governance.

scout_reference_extension.purpose: SCOUT example shows how domain-specific logic lives in Surface Extension, not in XAS.
validation_rules: All governed actions require confidence visibility
All interpretive outputs require CQX metadata
scout_reference_extension.note: SCOUT is an example of what a Surface Extension looks like. The actual SCOUT product spec is maintained by SCOUT product team, not by XAS.

ownership_model.xas: Generate reusable UXC execution backbone. Enforce execution gates. Validate Surface Extension completeness.
ownership_model.dtc: Translate universal spec and extension contract into executable architecture. Localize domain logic. Orchestrate surface-specific implementations.
ownership_model.codex: Implement components, runtime systems, validation tooling, and deployment scaffolding (once gates pass).
ownership_model.drj: Approve orchestration fidelity, emotional posture, and experiential correctness for each Surface Extension.
ownership_model.ptc: Approve new Surface Extension types. Govern architecture boundaries.

required_corrected_output_shape.design_doctrine: The operator senses emerging signal intelligence through calm recursive orchestration, not dashboard noise.

codex_execution_readiness.execution_blocker_rule: Codex must not execute full surface implementation if ANY of these is missing or incomplete.
codex_execution_readiness.approval_required: DTC checklist sign-off (all 10 items verified) before Codex execution unlocks

final_rule.xas: Creates the reusable execution backbone and enforces execution gates.
final_rule.surface_extension: Defines domain intelligence and runtime semantics (not owned by XAS).
final_rule.dtc: Converts specification into executable architecture. Localizes domain logic. Signs off on gate completion.
final_rule.drj: Approves experiential fidelity of each Surface Extension.
final_rule.ptc: Approves architecture changes, new extension types, governance decisions

ptc_approval.scope: Narrow patch only. Add gates, registry, and clarification. No architecture reopen.
ptc_approval.rationale: XAS v0.1 architecture is sound. Four patches provide necessary gatekeeping and clarity before production use.
ptc_approval.note: SCOUT-specific runtime design proceeds only through the SCOUT_SIGNAL_INTELLIGENCE extension layer. Not through XAS automation.
